analysis_successful_prompt: Evaluate whether the agent had a successful call with the user. For a successful call, the agent should have a complete conversation with user, finished the task, and have not ran into technical issues, or caused user frustration. Besides, the agent was not blocked by a call screen or encountered voicemail.
analysis_summary_prompt: Write a 1-3 sentence summary of the call based on the call transcript. Should capture the important information and actions taken during the call.
analysis_user_sentiment_prompt: Evaluate user's sentiment, mood and satisfaction level.

post_call_analysis_data.name: call_summary
post_call_analysis_data.description: Write a 1-3 sentence summary of the call based on the call transcript. Should capture the important information and actions taken during the call.

post_call_analysis_data.name: call_successful
post_call_analysis_data.description: Evaluate whether the agent had a successful call with the user. For a successful call, the agent should have a complete conversation with user, finished the task, and have not ran into technical issues, or caused user frustration. Besides, the agent was not blocked by a call screen or encountered voicemail.

post_call_analysis_data.name: user_sentiment
post_call_analysis_data.description: Evaluate user's sentiment, mood and satisfaction level.

post_call_analysis_data.name: caller_name
post_call_analysis_data.description: Full name of the caller as stated during the call. Empty string if not provided.

post_call_analysis_data.name: caller_phone
post_call_analysis_data.description: Phone number the caller provided for callback. May differ from caller ID. Empty string if not provided.

post_call_analysis_data.name: caller_address
post_call_analysis_data.description: Full service address including street, city, state. Empty string if not provided.

post_call_analysis_data.name: service_requested
post_call_analysis_data.description: The specific HVAC service or problem described. Short description.

post_call_analysis_data.name: call_type
post_call_analysis_data.description: Type of call. One of: new_service, emergency, callback, existing_customer, general_question, spam, wrong_number.

post_call_analysis_data.name: urgency
post_call_analysis_data.description: Urgency level: emergency, high, medium, low.

post_call_analysis_data.name: is_hot_lead
post_call_analysis_data.description: True if this is a hot lead — caller wants service soon and provided contact details.

post_call_analysis_data.name: lead_score
post_call_analysis_data.description: Score 1-10. 9-10: emergency needing immediate service. 7-8: active repair/install request. 5-6: maintenance/quote. 3-4: low intent. 1-2: spam/wrong number/robocall.

post_call_analysis_data.name: transfer_attempted
post_call_analysis_data.description: True if agent attempted to transfer the call to a human.

post_call_analysis_data.name: transfer_success
post_call_analysis_data.description: True if transfer was successfully connected. False if transfer failed.

post_call_analysis_data.name: vulnerable_occupant
post_call_analysis_data.description: True if caller mentioned elderly, children, medical equipment, or other vulnerable person affected by the HVAC issue.

post_call_analysis_data.name: emergency
post_call_analysis_data.description: True if this is a genuine HVAC emergency (no heat in winter, no AC with vulnerable occupant, gas smell, CO detector).

post_call_analysis_data.name: notification_type
post_call_analysis_data.description: Notification priority routing. One of: emergency, hot_lead, general_lead, follow_up_required, existing_customer, spam, nonemergency_lead.

post_call_analysis_data.name: job_type
post_call_analysis_data.description: Category of the job. One of: repair, install, maintenance, quote, emergency, existing_customer, general_inquiry, other.

post_call_analysis_data.name: language
post_call_analysis_data.description: Language the caller spoke. One of: en, es, other.

post_call_analysis_data.name: booking_attempted
post_call_analysis_data.description: Was a booking or appointment attempted? For Standard plan calls this is always false.

post_call_analysis_data.name: booking_success
post_call_analysis_data.description: Was a booking successfully made? For Standard plan calls this is always false.

post_call_analysis_data.name: notes
post_call_analysis_data.description: Additional details not captured elsewhere — equipment brand, model, access notes, preferred callback time, anything relevant.
